pages.title: Safe Dev vs Live Layout Demo
pages.instructions: Each preview shows the live page when a site allows embedding, or a saved screenshot when it does not. Same section, either way. These same-origin demo files embed reliably on GitHub Pages.

pages.title: Real Website Embed Test
pages.instructions: Nelson Structural is included as a third-party real-site smoke test because it currently allows iframe embedding. If that ever changes, the controlled demo page above remains the reliable walkthrough.

seedNotes.comment: Layout works. Review results should stay at the top of the page section, not follow me while scrolling.
Multiple reviewer notes need to be visible together so we can compare feedback quickly.
Real website embed test: use this page to show that the reviewer can load a live public site when the site allows framing.
